bugs_found.description: signNoZero<float> returns 0 for NaN, violates ne_zero.
negate<int16_t> is not a global involution. negate(negate(-32767))=-32768. INT16_MAX special case wrong.

notes: set tactic NOT available in Lean 4 stdlib
norm_num tactic NOT available in Lean 4 stdlib
linarith NOT available, ring NOT available
split_ifs NOT available in Lean 4 stdlib - use by_cases
variable {w hw} at module level conflicts with explicit (w : Nat) (hw : 0 < w) in function signatures - always use explicit {w : Nat} {hw : 0 < w} in function headers instead
List.get_mem has signature: get l i ∈ l (not get_mem l i _)
List.mem_replicate: l.mem_replicate returns n≠0 ∧ a = x; extract with .2
median_const proof: use median_mem + List.mem_replicate to get = x
pairwise_mergeSort uses decide (a ≤ b) = true, not (a ≤ b) = true
MFState init with head = w-1 so first insert goes to slot 0 via Nat.sub_add_cancel + Nat.mod_self
omega works for Nat.mod_lt and modular arithmetic in head/tail proofs
